data.name: BusinessInvitationBodyTemplateDefault
data.value:
Hello,

{invitation_intro_html}

{acceptance_link_html}

Your invitation token is:

{token}

This invitation expires at {expires_at_utc}.

Use this token in the Darwin business onboarding flow or contact your administrator if you need assistance.

data.name: BusinessInvitationIntroInvitedHtml
data.value: You have been invited to join {business_name} on Darwin as {role}.

data.name: BusinessInvitationIntroReissuedHtml
data.value: Your invitation to join {business_name} on Darwin as {role} has been reissued.

data.name: AccountActivationBodyTemplateDefault
data.value:
Hello,

Use the following token to confirm the Darwin account email for {email}:

{token}

This token expires at {expires_at_utc}.

data.name: PasswordResetBodyTemplateDefault
data.value:
Hello,

Use the following token to reset the Darwin account password for {email}:

{token}

This token expires at {expires_at_utc}.

data.name: PhoneVerificationSmsTemplateDefault
data.value: Your Darwin verification code is {token}. It expires at {expires_at_utc} UTC.

data.name: PhoneVerificationWhatsAppTemplateDefault
data.value: Confirm your Darwin mobile number with code {token}. It expires at {expires_at_utc} UTC.

data.name: PhoneVerificationSmsUnavailable
data.value: SMS verification is not available right now.

data.name: PhoneVerificationWhatsAppUnavailable
data.value: WhatsApp verification is not available right now.
